title: Accurate, Interdisciplinary and Transparent Structure-property Understanding with Deep Native Structural Reasoning
innovation_summary: Accurate, Interdisciplinary and Transparent Structure-property Understanding with Deep Native Structural Reasoning: Here we introduce SciReasoner, a multimodal scientific foundation model for native structural reasoning across proteins, small molecules and inorganic crystals.
